inlineContent.text: The protocol simplifies aggregating services and resolve
a service instance for a certain locale.

abstract.text: This protocol is implemented by locale-specific services.
This protocol is implemented by locale-specific services.
This class is inherited by all Pro services and also
serves as a namespace for Pro service types.
The unique locale key to use when looking up values.
KeyboardKit helps you create fully customizable keyboard extensions, using Swift and SwiftUI.
This enum defines localized keyboard texts.
